ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for David Levin (Administrator).
Susan Gee also present in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schultz stated that he is not aware of anyone objecting, that they entered into a settlement with one Party which was approved by the Court, that all of the other Heirs are represented by Counsel, that he is in contact with them and that they represented to him that they are not objecting to the petition. Ms. Gee stated that she is not objecting. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

Status on close of estate is continued to December 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Giulio Accornero for American Research Bureau (Petitioner).
Lawrence Siracusa for Gene Marchi (Administrator).
Allison Bellumori appeared by telephone for Brandenburger & Davis.
Susan Gee also present.

Mr. Accornero addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with respect to whether there is sufficient information to establish the paternal heirs and the maternal heirs, spoke of Arleta's relationship to James and distribution to the predeceased heir, referred to a will and stated that there is an Estate in Canada. Mr. Siracusa had nothing to add. Ms. Bellumori stated that she supports the petition. The Petition to Determine those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1666 45th Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Gene Marchi and David Levin (Co-Administrators).

The sale was confirmed at $1,082,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 19, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Continued To Dec-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Gene Marchi and David Levin (Co-Administrators).
Allison Bellumori appeared by telephone for Brandenburger and Davis.
Giulio Accornero for American Research Bureau.

Mr. Accornero stated that DHCS did not receive notice and that they filed their request for special notice after he filed this petition. The Court noted that there is no proof as to the paternal heirs, questions whether there is enough as to the maternal heirs to connect the dots and Ms. Ball's share. The Petition to Determine Those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate is continued to December 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Accornero to provide additional proof of heirship and to make the appropriate corrections to the pending petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Allison Bellumori appeared by telephone for Brandenberger & Davis.
Giulio Accornero for American Research Bureau (Objector).
Andrew Schultz for Gene marchi and David Levin (Proposed Administrators).

Mr. Schultz informed the Court that Mr. Bassin submitted a Substitution of Attorney and that Sheila Allen is now in pro per. Mr. Accornero stated that Ms. Allen has now withdrawn her petition and that he is not here to object to Mr. Schultz's petition. The Court raised the issue of direct service to Ms. Whitcombe and the issue bond. Mr. Accornero stated that he has a Power of Attorney from Ms. Whitcombe to her Niece, that he just received it yesterday and that it is not filed. The Court informed Counsel that it has to get filed. The Petitions for Letters of Administration are taken under submission pending receipt of something that satisfies service to Ms. Whitcombe and a declaration concerning the amount of bond.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Continued To May-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for petitioner Sheila Allen; Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Guardian; Guilio Accornero for the American Research Bureau; Tracy Potts (by CourtCall) for Brandenburg & Davis; also present Jerry Levi and Susan Gee.

Mr. Accornero reported that he would be filing an opposition to the petition. Ms. Potts stated that she plans to file a competing petition. Mr. Accornero said that he had spoken with Antrew Schultz and expected to bring a petition for appointment of Gene Marchi as an independent administrator. Ms. Potts said that she should have her petition on file by March 20, 2017. The Court continued the pending petition to May 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, with any opposition to it to be filed by April 25. The Court added that he would allow any competing petition to be set for hearing on that date provided it was filed in sufficient time to satisfy notice requirements.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
